arts.sum: Manchester United are looking to improve their defensive unit in the summer, and they have identified Jonas Adejetey as a target. arts.ttl: Newcastle United Eddie Howe statement as head coach admitted to hospital
arts.sum: A club statement read: "Eddie Howe will miss Newcastle United ’s Premier League game against Manchester United on Sunday due to illness. Howe, who missed the Press conference on Friday to preview the game with the Red Devils, has been admitted to hospital due to an illness.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Manchester United – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Champions League-chasing Newcastle United welcome Manchester United to St James’ Park this Sunday. On Monday night, the Magpies eased past a relegation-threatened Leicester City courtesy of a 3-0 away win. Eddie Howe has received a huge boost by the imminent return of Anthony Gordon. arts.ttl: Fernandes chance, zero upgrades in bold Newcastle and Man U combined XI verdict
arts.sum: If this is based on those players who are fit this weekend, you could probably only make a strong argument for one Manchester United star getting in a combined starting line-up on current form: Bruno Fernandes. For the first time in pretty much 20 years, Newcastle are streets ahead of Manchester United in terms of quality players.
